one_line_thesis: California citrus-and-land platform (~10,500 acres, water rights, Harvest JV) priced near GAAP book; dated development cash and ag transformation offer partial dhando. Watch until Sunkist margins and distribution cadence prove out (~5.3% base yield-curve at ~$11.83).

deep_dive.executive_summary: Limoneira is a scarce California ag-and-land platform: diversified citrus production, packing infrastructure, rental cash, and a 50% stake in Harvest at Limoneira (Phase 2 home sales underway). FY2025 operating income improved to $20.4 million despite lower revenue, helped by real-estate and water gains, but cash from operations troughed at $6.0 million during the Sunkist transition. At ~$11.83 (Nasdaq, June 6, 2026), our base case is a 7-year dated payoff to $17.00 per share (haircut development guide plus normalized ag and episodic asset sales, not GAAP book alone), implying 5.3% per year...

decision.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

optionality.rule: Every option requires a beneficiary, probability, timing, remaining capital, failure case, and non-overlap control; absence of option value must be explicit rather than unvalued.

committee.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

method_fit.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
applicability_tests: The security owns a legally enforceable economic claim on scarce assets or royalties.
Material value is omitted or poorly represented by current GAAP earnings.
Asset quantities, ownership, overlap, timing, and remaining capital can be reconciled.
Comparable values can be adjusted for location, quality, control, liquidity, and realization time.
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: A complete security value is intentionally withheld while material components are unpriced. Attribution restarts after the first proof-complete baseline.

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

valuation_decision.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

personas.falsifier: FCF yield < 0.5% or commoditized archetype (turnaround/optionality only)
personas.label: Chris Hohn / TCI

personas.falsifier: dhando -> none OR net-debt/EBITDA > 3 OR bear return < -15%
personas.label: Mohnish Pabrai

personas.falsifier: No asset intensity / pricing power (moat eroding + non-croupier)
personas.label: Murray Stahl

personas.falsifier: FCF yield below universe median OR base IRR below median
personas.label: Joel Greenblatt
personas.why_silent: Universe criteria not met: earnings_yield_high, quality_proxy

personas.falsifier: Operating lens only — no dated inefficiency / catalyst
personas.label: John Mihaljevic / MOI

personas.falsifier: No dated contractual payoff or royalty/trust structure
personas.label: Horizon Kinetics
personas.why_silent: Universe criteria not met: asset_or_event, dated_payoff

active_lenses.label: Mohnish Pabrai
active_lenses.falsifier: dhando -> none OR net-debt/EBITDA > 3 OR bear return < -15%

risk_claims.claim: Growth regime softening: YoY growth moved to -116.7% to -500.0% YoY (baseline median -26.1% YoY) in the latest quarter. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.

*Primary risk: Sunkist transition and citrus margin compression extend the cash-from-operations trough while development distributions slip, leaving equity exposed to ~$90M debt without ag cash cover.

Inversion: If lemon volumes hit 4.0–4.5M cartons at stable pricing and Harvest distributions track the management table, the equity yield curve compresses toward book-plus-cash NAV without heroic ag growth.
